description: Active-site motif alignment visualization comparing catalytic residues across squid ADAR2, human ADAR2, and human ADAT1
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as patches

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(16, 6))
ax.axis('off')

# Title
ax.text(0.5, 0.97, 'Active-Site Motif Alignment: Squid ADAR2 vs Human ADAR2 vs Human ADAT1',
        transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', ha='center', va='top')

# CHAE motif alignment
y_start = 0.82
ax.text(0.02, y_start, 'Motif 1: Catalytic Center (Zn-binding His + Proton-donor Glu)',
        transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='#1565C0')

sequences = [
    ("Squid ADAR2 (457)", "INGEYMNDRGF", "AVND", "CHAE", "IIAR", "RCFLRFIYDQL"),
    ("Human ADAR2 (394)", "INGEYMSDRGL", "ALND", "CHAE", "IISR", "RSLLRFLYTQL"),
    ("Human ADAT1",       "     ------", "----", "----", "----", "-----------"),
]

y = y_start - 0.06
colors_match = '#4CAF50'    # green for match
colors_diff = '#FFC107'     # yellow for conservative substitution
colors_active = '#F44336'   # red for active site
colors_missing = '#9E9E9E'  # grey for missing

for name, pre, pre2, motif, post1, post2 in sequences:
    x_pos = 0.22
    ax.text(0.02, y, name, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=10, fontfamily='monospace', 
            fontweight='bold', va='center')
    
    # Pre-motif
    for i, char in enumerate(pre):
        color = colors_missing if char == '-' else (colors_match if i < len(sequences[0][1]) and char == sequences[0][1][i] else colors_diff)
        ax.text(x_pos + i*0.018, y, char, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=10, 
                fontfamily='monospace', va='center', color='black' if char != '-' else '#BDBDBD')
    
    x_pos += len(pre) * 0.018
    for i, char in enumerate(pre2):
        color = colors_missing if char == '-' else 'black'
        ax.text(x_pos + i*0.018, y, char, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=10, 
                fontfamily='monospace', va='center', color=color)
    
    x_pos += len(pre2) * 0.018
    # Active site motif - highlighted
    for i, char in enumerate(motif):
        bg_color = colors_active if char != '-' else colors_missing
        fcolor = 'white' if char != '-' else '#BDBDBD'
        ax.text(x_pos + i*0.018, y, char, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=12, 
                fontfamily='monospace', va='center', fontweight='bold', color=fcolor,
                bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.1', facecolor=bg_color, edgecolor='none', alpha=0.8))
    
    x_pos += len(motif) * 0.018 + 0.005
    for i, char in enumerate(post1 + post2):
        color = colors_missing if char == '-' else 'black'
        ax.text(x_pos + i*0.018, y, char, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=10, 
                fontfamily='monospace', va='center', color=color)
    
    y -= 0.05

# Add annotation
ax.text(0.22, y - 0.02, '                         ^^^^', transform=ax.transAxes, 
        fontsize=10, fontfamily='monospace', color=colors_active)
ax.text(0.22, y - 0.05, '              Zn²⁺-coordinating His + Proton-donor Glu',
        transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=9, color=colors_active, fontstyle='italic')
ax.text(0.22, y - 0.08, '              ADAT1 lacks this motif entirely',
        transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=9, color=colors_missing, fontweight='bold')

# PCG motif alignment
y2 = y - 0.15
ax.text(0.02, y2, 'Motif 2: Zinc-Coordinating Cysteine (PCG motif)',
        transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='#1565C0')

sequences2 = [
    ("Squid ADAR2 (515)", "KLKPNIQFHLYISTA", "PCG", "DARIFSPHGQDVETG"),
    ("Human ADAR2 (451)", "RLKENVQFHLYISTS", "PCG", "DARIFSPHEPILEGS"),
    ("Human ADAT1 (141)", "KLRRDLIFVFFSSHT", "PCG", "DASIIPMLEFEDQPC"),
]

y3 = y2 - 0.06
for name, pre, motif, post in sequences2:
    ax.text(0.02, y3, name, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=10, fontfamily='monospace',
            fontweight='bold', va='center')
    x_pos = 0.24
    
    for i, char in enumerate(pre):
        ax.text(x_pos + i*0.018, y3, char, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=10,
                fontfamily='monospace', va='center')
    
    x_pos += len(pre) * 0.018
    for i, char in enumerate(motif):
        ax.text(x_pos + i*0.018, y3, char, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=12,
                fontfamily='monospace', va='center', fontweight='bold', color='white',
                bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.1', facecolor='#FF5722', edgecolor='none', alpha=0.8))
    
    x_pos += len(motif) * 0.018 + 0.005
    for i, char in enumerate(post):
        ax.text(x_pos + i*0.018, y3, char, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=10,
                fontfamily='monospace', va='center')
    
    y3 -= 0.05

ax.text(0.24, y3 - 0.02, '                              ^^^', transform=ax.transAxes,
        fontsize=10, fontfamily='monospace', color='#FF5722')
ax.text(0.24, y3 - 0.05, '              Shared across superfamily (ADAR + ADAT)',
        transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=9, color='#FF5722', fontstyle='italic')

# Conclusion box
conclusion = (
    "CONCLUSION: Squid ADAR2 active-site residues match human ADAR2 perfectly.\n"
    "The CHAE catalytic motif (diagnostic for ADAR subfamily) is conserved, while\n"
    "ADAT1 lacks it. The PCG motif is shared by both families (superfamily-level).\n"
    "→ The protein is a catalytically active ADAR2, not a tRNA deaminase."
)
ax.text(0.5, 0.03, conclusion, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=9.5,
        ha='center', va='bottom', fontfamily='monospace',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#E8F5E9', edgecolor='#4CAF50', alpha=0.9))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('active_site_alignment.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Active site alignment figure saved")
